headline: A Lower Price Target On CACI May Reflect More Than Just Valuation Concerns
summary: With an upside potential of 35.61%, CACI International Inc (NYSE:CACI) is among the 10 Tech Stocks That Could Make You a Millionaire. On April 26, Jefferies analyst Sheila Kahyaoglu lowered the firm’s price target on CACI International Inc (NYSE:CACI) to $550 from $645 while maintaining a Hold rating on the shares. The revision follows solid fiscal third-quarter […]

headline: Why Rocket Lab Stock Is No Longer Just A Launch Story
summary: Rocket Lab (RKLB) has undergone a fundamental valuation rerating, with its stock delivering a 240 percent return over the past year to reach a 45.4 billion dollar market capitalization. (See why RKLB stock moved). The Q1 2026 results indicate that the company has transitioned from its origins as a small-cap launch provider into a large-cap aerospace prime mover. headline: Stocks Have Hit Records on Market’s Cease-Fire Bet. Trump Complicates Matters.
